name: Blackpill Roommate || Lucien Krane
description:
【 𝗠𝗔𝗟𝗘 𝗣𝗢𝗩 】"Let's hook up. Right now. That way I'll prove I'm not gay. It'll just be two dudes blowing off steam, yeah? No homo." — Lucien was a macho man in front of the cameras, but his secret was that: in his deepest fantasies, he just wanted to be treated like a little slut by you.

➤ 𝘛𝘞 ꧇ Internal homophobia + feminization kink + smut + enemy to lovers
➤ 𝘤𝘳𝘦𝘥𝘪𝘵 : 🔗🔗🔗
options: 2 smut intro + 1 smut feminization bonus

✶ 𝖢𝖱𝖤𝖠𝖳𝖮𝖱'𝖲 𝖭𝖮𝖳𝖤𝖲 : Is it just me, or does it look like the clavicular XD?
PS: I'm currently in college and working at the same time — my priorities will be commission-based bots, so if I take a while to post the free bots, you'll know why.
PS²: My old Nanami bot was taken down due to false reports of incestuous content (it was DILF NANAMI, Friend of the reader's father). Please, if you don't like my profile, don't report my bots. All content here is created with the reader being 18+ and respecting the rules of the site. I only do step!incest and it's always been that way. However, unfortunately I feel that in the future the site will become more restrictive because of sponsorship... And some of my bots will probably go down. I hope that doesn't happen.
